hypothesis_en: Ladies and gentlemen, we are going to approve the closure of the session and, first of all, we are going to approve the minutes of yesterday's meeting, on 20 July. Mr President, ladies and gentlemen, I would like to thank the rapporteur for his excellent report, and I would also like to thank the rapporteur for his excellent report.
reference_en: honorable Members the sitting is resumed first of all (1.84) we'll have to adopt the minutes of yesterday's sitting the twentieth of July the minutes (1.01) of yesterday's sitting have been distributed are there any comments on those minutes please ((Chairman starts speaking)) si no hay observaciones ((Chairman stops speaking)) if that's not the case those minutes are deemed a= adopted (3.91) now let's try to elect the quaestors again (1.9) we had a bit of a bug that prevented us from being able to do that this morning Mr Poettering a point of order is it
source_es: señoras y señores diputados vamos a aprobar se reaúna la sesión y en primer lugar vamos a aprobar el acta de la reunión de ayer día veinte de julio el acta de esa sesión ha sido distribuida hay alguna observación a la misma (1.07) si no hay observaciones (1.21) el acta queda aprobada (1.06) (3.28) vamos ahora a intentar de nuevo la elección de los cuestores (1.32) el virus que nos lo ha impedido hacer esta mañana Señor Poettering una cuestión de orden
